Table: blog_posts | Columns: id, title, author, category, views, published_at
Table: customers | Columns: id, name, city, created_at
Table: departments | Columns: id, name, budget
Table: employees | Columns: id, name, department_id, role, salary, hire_date
Table: inventory | Columns: id, product_id, warehouse, stock_qty, last_restock
Table: order_items | Columns: id, order_id, product_id, quantity
Table: orders | Columns: id, customer_id, amount, status, created_at
Table: products | Columns: id, name, category, price
Table: support_tickets | Columns: id, customer_id, subject, priority, status, created_at, resolved_at
